series_metadata.series_title: Driver Training Curriculum and Training Record
series_metadata.series_description: Chapter 4501-7 of the Administrative Code, Chapter 4501-8 of the Administrative Code, and Chapter 4501-21 of the Administrative Code requires Class "D" driver education programs, abbreviated adult education programs, and juvenile offender programs use agency approved curriculums when teaching students. The contents of this record series includes Class "D" driver training school curriculum (DTO 0108), abbreviated adult driver training curriculum (DTO 0210), and juvenile driver improvement program curriculum (OTS 0113) and the "Bi-annual Traffic Safety Trend Report" (OTS 0100).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: superseded, obsolete, or replaced, or deemed non-vital ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete, or replaced, or deemed non-vital
